description_long: This futuristic airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a metallic silver finish and dark, matte-black wings. The wings are swept and mounted mid-fuselage, each with prominent engine nacelles integrated near the tips, suggesting advanced propulsion. The cockpit is forward-mounted and seamlessly blended into the body, with a tinted canopy that appears to be single-seat. The tail section is sharply pointed, with no visible vertical stabilizer, giving it a unique, almost stealth-like profile. The landing gear is not visible, implying a retractable or concealed design. Accents of green and orange add visual interest to the engines and wing joints, enhancing its high-tech appearance.
description: A sleek, silver and black futuristic airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, integrated engine nacelles, and a forward-blended cockpit. The design is angular and stealthy, with green and orange accent details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept wings, and prominent engine nacelles with green accents; the pointed tail and angular design are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the mid-mounted swept wings, dual engine nacelles, and the forward cockpit canopy; orange accents on the wings are visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engine nacelles, wing structure, and the streamlined body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the sharply pointed tail, the angular wing configuration, and the twin engine nacelles; the overall width and symmetry are evident.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and pronounced engine nacelles; slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wings near the tips.
attribute_tail_design: No visible vertical stabilizer; sharply pointed tail with a minimalist, unconventional configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined, tinted canopy.
